task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/commit/page.tsx

Fix the return_url in stripe.confirmPayment to include all card data as query params.

Find the stripe.confirmPayment call and replace the return_url with:
const params = new URLSearchParams({
  truth: searchParams.get("truth") || "",
  commitment: searchParams.get("commitment") || "",
  stakeAmount: String(stakeAmount),
  forfeitDestination: forfeitDestination,
  dueDate: new Date(Date.now() + 86400000).toISOString()
});
const returnUrl = `${window.location.origin}/success?${params.toString()}`;

Then use returnUrl as the return_url value.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/commit/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
return_url includes truth, commitment, stakeAmount, forfeitDestination, dueDate as query params
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: change anything else
DO NOT: use ast.parse
